authorities.court: Supreme Court of the United States

pages.495: We conclude that in the field of public education the doctrine of separate but equal has no place. Separate educational facilities are inherently unequal.

authorities.court: Supreme Court of the United States

pages.675: The Court now holds that same-sex couples may exercise the fundamental right to marry.

authorities.court: Supreme Court of the United States

pages.444: The prosecution may not use statements stemming from custodial interrogation unless it demonstrates procedural safeguards.
